existence.end: to 181st Rifle Division (Order of Lenin for Stalingrad)

positions.label: Garrison of Stalingrad city as the Germans reach the Volga
Holding the city centre, station and Mamayev Kurgan in the first assault
Burned out (≈200 men left), withdrawn across the Volga

notes: First formation. Raised in Stalingrad from NKVD troops; its five regiments (269th–272nd, 282nd) and Col. Saraev (also head of the Stalingrad garrison) held the burning city centre in the critical days of 23 Aug – early Oct 1942 before the rifle/guards divisions crossed the Volga, then was withdrawn nearly destroyed and made a Guards-equivalent (Order of Lenin). City positions are schematic west-bank points inside the drawn pocket strip, so side checks may report it as contested.
